title: microchilus cajamarcae
intro: Microchilus cajamarcae is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the Cajamarca vine. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. Its health benefits include potential applications in treating various conditions such as fever, respiratory infections, and skin irritations. Microchilus cajamarcae can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, which is typically steeped for 5-10 minutes to release its active compounds.
